item.title: ADOCHANGE: Giving Back to the Community
item.description: How Adokiye's charity program is making a difference in Nigerian communities.

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Making of Glory ft. Sym19
item.description: The inspiration and creative process behind the hit Christmas collaboration with Sym19.

item.title: My Journey in Afro
item.description: From church choirs in Imo State to the global stage — Adokiye's musical story.

item.title: The Power of Documentary Storytelling in Shaping Public Discourse
item.description: The Power of Documentary Storytelling in Shaping Public Discourse — an in-depth exploration with evidence-based insights.
